body:
This fixed the bug that resulted in `NaN`s in the first time slice of any radiation-related diagnostics.

Related PR: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/pull/1263

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

- **Bug Fixes**
  - Improved numerical comparison logic in surface property calculations to ensure consistent and reliable performance during evaluations.

<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
title: Check for equality with float(t) instead of t

body:
<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

- **Chores**
  - Updated the `ClimaParams` dependency to version `0.10.27` for improved overall performance.

- **Refactor**
  - Refined cloud microphysics computations to enhance how liquid droplet concentrations are determined.
  - Expanded aerosol parameter mapping to better integrate additional moisture metrics, including specific humidity related to liquid water.

title: Update ML CDND function
